title: PlaytimeReward
description: Reward your players for their playtime with fully customizable commands, persistent timers, and flexible execution options.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

PlaytimeReward is a lightweight yet powerful plugin that allows you to automatically execute commands for players based on their accumulated online time. Whether you want to reward loyal players with keys, items, or permissions, this plugin gives you full control over timing, permissions, and execution.

✨ Features:

Run commands at configurable time intervals (minimum 1 minute).

Execute commands as CONSOLE or as the PLAYER.

Supports placeholders: %player% and {player}.

Optional immediate execution on player join.

Per-player persistent timers that survive disconnects and restarts.

Restrict rewards with a custom permission (playtimereward.use).

Reload configuration at runtime with /rpcreload.

Perfect for vote keys, loyalty rewards, or any other time-based progression system!
